title: acer glabrum var. douglasii
intro: Acer glabrum var. douglasii, also known as Douglas maple or Rocky Mountain maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the family Sapindaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Acer glabrum var. douglasii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
